assertions.name: hostname_arrived

assertions.name: users_path_arrived
assertions.detail: Run the shell command `[ -e /Users/david ] && echo yes || echo no` and reply with only its output. Thought for 1s no 1m

assertions.name: pwd_arrived
assertions.detail: Run the shell command `pwd` and reply with only the path it prints. Thought for 1s /home/e2e/helmor-workspaces/helmor-ta

beats.caption: The agent below runs in a Docker container; the laptop is just the viewport.
"/Users/david exist?" → no. The container's filesystem has no /Users tree at all.
"pwd" → /home/e2e/... — the agent's CWD lives on the container, not the laptop.
